CustomField.description: This field displays Accounting Profile for transactions related to this account with no associated contract. This profile will map GL accounts for journal entries. If a transaction is associated with a lease, the accounting profile from the lease will determine GL mappings.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select an Accounting Profile for transactions related to this account with no associated contract. This profile will map GL accounts for journal entries. If a transaction is associated with a lease, the accounting profile from the lease will determine GL mappings.
CustomField.label: Accounting Profile
